title: erythroxylum stipulosum
intro: Erythroxylum stipulosum is a species of flowering plant in the Erythroxylaceae family, commonly known as the Cat's Claw Vine or Uña de Gato. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits associated with Erythroxylum stipulosum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, often used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues.
